name: summpdf-master
description: SummPDF has been successfully migrated from Next.js into a unified **Vite React SPA** frontend and a high-performance **Go Gin API** backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "go run -C backend cmd/main.go" --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && go mod tidy
